inputs.titre: Création de la Manufacture royale des glaces de miroirs

reason: The image depicts a workshop scene that appears to represent artisans crafting mirrors. The clothing (aprons, simple shirts), tools (hammers, chisels), lighting (candles), and architecture (stone walls, wood benches) generally fit the 17th-century context. There are no immediately obvious modern elements like smartphones or zippers. The overall atmosphere aligns with the description of a bustling workshop of the era. However, the candles have the style of modern candles and are not the correct size and shape. Additionally, some of the tools and fixtures appear more modern than historical.
